subcodes.first_line: O thou sincere servant of the Ancient Beauty! The fellowship of hearts and love of souls are manifest in His honor Ali-Akbar of the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بنده مخلصا جمال قدمک بر احسانی الفت قلوب و محبت نفوس در جناب علی اکبر آستان
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
